title: Koalas and eucalyptus
description: Not a big mod that will add a little variety to your Minecraft world, it adds koala, eucalyptus and some other things
body:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

WARNING

Be careful when upgrading to other versions, older versions may have a different domain and name, which may result in the loss of all mod elements.

versions below 1.20.1 may contain many bugs

The translation may contain errors (you can report errors at [Curseforge comments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/koalas-and-eucalyptus/comments))

Thank you for your attention : )

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Discover something new in the world of Minecraft! Are you tired of the usual mobs that wander from one mod to another? Do you want to find a unique creature that will add a special atmosphere to your game? Then you will definitely like this mod!

Eucalyptus trees? There are also! The main highlight is koalas, cute and fluffy creatures that you definitely will not find in other popular mods.

Koalas are not just decorative mobs. You can interact with them! You can feed them eucalyptus leaves, which makes these animals even more attractive to players who like to build relationships with the game world. This adds an element of care and observation to the game, which is very appreciated by many players.

Eucalyptus Building Blocks
In addition to new mobs, the mod expands your construction capabilities. Now you can create eucalyptus building blocks that have a unique light green hue.  Available:
eucalyptus boards
eucalyptus stairs
eucalyptus fences
eucalyptus slabs
and other decorative items.

Although the mod does not yet have signs and boats, the developers are actively working on it. This will allow you to create even more diverse and interesting structures. Eucalyptus blocks are ideal for those looking for fresh solutions for their houses or other large projects.

The Koala and Eucalyptus mod is an ideal choice for players who want to add something truly unique and exotic to their Minecraft. It combines new, unusual mobs and a wide selection of building materials, which allows you to take a fresh look at the already familiar gameplay.

Made (in/with):
• Blockbench 
• MCreator
• Paint
• Paint 3D
• Google Translate

The project is also published on CurseForge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/koals-and-eucalyptus
